productDisplayName: Peter England Men Statements Black Wallet
description: Crafted from soft, genuine leather, this wallet from peter england is a must-have accessory for the well-dressed male. Peter England perfects this traditional accessory's foray into modern wardrobes with its classic techniques and innovative designs. Carry your monetary essentials with ease in this classic wallet.Dimensions: 11.5 cm X 9.2 cmHas two main compartmentsThree credit card slots on either side of the walletBranding embossed on the frontCareRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
